patch.value:
## Context
Shipped: schema add-type, remove-type, add-status, remove-status, schema show, schema list, governance.workflow_enforcement, per-type type_workflows, create_default_type.

Unit test coverage:
- tests/unit/schema-command.spec.ts
- tests/unit/settings-validator.spec.ts lines 180-213 (type_workflows, workflow_enforcement)
- tests/unit/item-type-definition.spec.ts line 190
- tests/unit/update-command.spec.ts line 2697 (runUpdate per-type workflow enforcement)

Integration test gap:
- No integration test for: pm schema add-type Spike -> pm create Spike 'test' -> pm update -> pm schema remove-type Spike (warns) -> verify state
- No integration test for schema add-status / remove-status with governance

## Acceptance criteria
- An integration test (in tests/integration/ or as part of governance-presets.integration.spec.ts) exercises the full schema-customization lifecycle end-to-end
- Test covers type creation + item creation + workflow enforcement + removal warning
- Uses sandboxed PM_PATH

## Evidence
tests/integration/governance-presets.integration.spec.ts; tests/unit/schema-command.spec.ts; docs/COMMANDS.md lines 388-408 (schema section)
Add integration test for schema add-type / remove-type round-trip with governance.workflow_enforcement

Schema customization (pm schema add-type, remove-type, add-status, remove-status) was shipped in PR #106 (2026-06-03). Unit tests cover settings-validator, item-type-definition, and schema-command. There is a governance-presets.integration.spec.ts for preset workflows but no integration test for the full schema customization round-trip: add custom type, create item of that type, enforce workflow transitions, remove type with items warning, then verify it is gone.

- An integration test (in tests/integration/ or as part of governance-presets.integration.spec.ts) exercises the full schema-customization lifecycle end-to-end
- Test covers type creation + item creation + workflow enforcement + removal warning
- Uses sandboxed PM_PATH
